_README: Expected plaintext + metadata for the cross-language Mode C fixture. The bytes in vpack_v1_2tasks.bin and vresults_v1_2results.bin are generated by veriguard-agent's src/tests/cross_lang_fixture.rs using the seed convention below. CrossLangFixtureCompatTest re-derives the same keys, parses the envelopes via VpackSerializer / VresultsTaskResultParser, and verifies all fields below match. To regenerate after a wire format change: see the regeneration recipe in the Rust test's doc comment, then update both sides.

seeds._README: Each key seed is a 32-byte array filled with a single byte value. Java tests build the byte arrays inline (e.g. Arrays.fill(new byte[32], (byte) 0x01)).

derived_public_keys_b64._README: Independently re-derivable from the seeds above via Ed25519/X25519 derive. Java test cross-checks these against the values embedded in the envelope (signature.signer_pub_b64 / envelope_encrypted.sender_x25519_pub_b64).
